title: rubus × semipraetextus
intro: Rubus × semipraetextus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the autumn-fruiting raspberry (Rubus auct.). The plant's leaves and stems contain medicinal properties, particularly high in antioxidants and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × semipraetextus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system due to its high content of vitamins C and E. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
